## Context Minor GC Working Set

Latest user ask:

transcript.content: 这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； live pannel.md可以去除掉了；
已经按你说的收成一条了： - `Project Assistant` 的接线我撤回了 - 改成一个独立扩展 `Codex Context Monitor` - 状态栏现在应该只做 `简短展示` - 点击后打开 `小窗口详情` - 详情窗口会跟着后台轮询自动更新 - `live-panel.md` 已经删掉，不再作为主入口
打开新窗口后 Codex Context Monitor 会自动更新到新窗口么？
会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：
codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要
已经改了，而且只改独立扩展。 现在的行为是：
点击状态栏 有时候没有反应； 或比较慢；
这两个问题我已经针对性修了： 1. 点击有时没反应 原因是点击后才同步去跑命令，窗口要等结果回来才出现。 现在改成： - 点击后立刻打开小窗口 - 如果有缓存先显示缓存 - 没缓存就先显示 `Loading…` - 后台再异步刷新内容
`Ctx: error` 的意思很直接： `独立扩展在刷新 context 大小时失败了。`
已经补上了。 现在独立扩展会把这几种情况明确分开：

decision.archive_summary: UI/UX decisions for the standalone `Codex Context Monitor` extension: merge duplicated entry points into one status-bar entry with brief display; click opens a small detail popup that auto-refreshes; remove `codex context meter` and `live-panel.md`; each VS Code window refreshes independently for its own workspace; when no repo/workspace is bound show `Ctx: no workspace` and include the currently bound workspace path in the tooltip; popup should open immediately, show cached content or `Loading…`, and refresh asynchronously; explicit error state/explanations were requested for `Ctx: error`.
decision.reasoning_summary: The thread is a sequence of UI refinements on one feature and is mostly closed by assistant confirmations. Raw assistant implementation/status turns are good eviction candidates. The user turns carry the durable product requirements and expected behaviors, so they should survive as compact pins. No older unresolved task appears to require keeping the full raw block; the next turn can travel lighter with pins plus the latest user turn retained by runtime.

applied.archiveSummary: UI/UX decisions for the standalone `Codex Context Monitor` extension: merge duplicated entry points into one status-bar entry with brief display; click opens a small detail popup that auto-refreshes; remove `codex context meter` and `live-panel.md`; each VS Code window refreshes independently for its own workspace; when no repo/workspace is bound show `Ctx: no workspace` and include the currently bound workspace path in the tooltip; popup should open immediately, show cached content or `Loading…`, and refresh asynchronously; explicit error state/explanations were requested for `Ctx: error`.
applied.reasoningSummary: The thread is a sequence of UI refinements on one feature and is mostly closed by assistant confirmations. Raw assistant implementation/status turns are good eviction candidates. The user turns carry the durable product requirements and expected behaviors, so they should survive as compact pins. No older unresolved task appears to require keeping the full raw block; the next turn can travel lighter with pins plus the latest user turn retained by runtime.
